title: Application Development Intern
description: As an Application Developer Intern, I helped the team develop applications used in daily operations, contributing to improved efficiency and reduced support tickets.
Revamped legacy systems and contributed to the maintenance and enhancement of existing web applications, collaborating with the team to optimize user experience and streamline workflows.
Assisted in developing both front-end and back-end components; built a new application with enhanced features using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, .NET, and MS SQL to deliver efficient web solutions.
Completed 500 hours of hands-on full-stack web development internship experience, adapting to modern development practices and continuously expanding technical skills.

title: BS Information Technology
description: Completed a 4-year Bachelor of Science in Information Technology program
Engaged in coursework covering algorithms, database systems, web development, software development, systems design, and system architecture.
Developed a capstone project titled Sandro’s Nook, an IoT-integrated smart transaction system for a café and bookstore, applying full-stack development and system design in a real-world scenario.
Actively involved in student leadership as a member of the college student council, contributing to organizational activities and collaborative initiatives within the academic community.

title: Agent-In Customer Service 2
description: As a Customer Service Representative, I handled inbound chats and calls to resolve customer concerns related to online and in-store purchases, efficiently multitasking by addressing issues and completing accurate documentation in real time.
Resolved customer concerns within an average handling time of five to six minutes per contact while maintaining accuracy and service quality.
Documented customer interactions, concerns, and resolutions using multiple tools, ensuring accuracy and completeness in real time.
Consistently met performance targets by maximizing available resources to improve efficiency and deliver high levels of customer satisfaction.

title: Hello, World!
description: Every developer has a starting point — mine was a blinking cursor on a blank screen and a blank sheet of yellow paper. Writing that first line of code sparked a curiosity that never really left. What began as a simple print statement slowly opened the door to a much bigger world. That moment became the foundation for everything that followed.
